personal.name: Rajat Ravindra Koorse
personal.title: AI-ML Engineer
personal.subtitle: GenAI • Multimodal Perception • Agentic Workflows
personal.bio: Over 3+ years of professional experience in developing scalable, high-performance AI-ML applications with a focus on GenAI and multimodal perception. Expertise in architecting LLM-driven pipelines, RAG-based architectures, and Agentic workflows. Skilled in deep learning-based perception modules for multi-modal sensor fusion (Camera, LiDAR, Radar).
personal.tagline: Building intelligent systems at the intersection of GenAI and Autonomous Perception

projects.name: GenAI-Powered ADAS Scenario Intelligence Platform
bullets: Led end-to-end development of a GenAI platform to automate critical ADAS scenario retrieval and scene understanding pipelines for autonomous validation.
Architected LLM-driven multimodal processing engines capable of digesting visual, textual, and tabular sensor data to extract behavioral patterns and edge cases.
Designed and deployed 20+ automated testing workflows using Agentic AI, accelerating validation timelines for Software-Defined Vehicle (SDV) modules by 40%.
Engineered production-ready microservices using Python and Flask to interface seamlessly with commercial LLM and vision APIs under high-concurrency constraints.
Conducted extensive model performance tuning and quantization techniques, driving down inference latency by 30% while retaining model evaluation accuracy.
Containerized application workflows using Docker and established scalable deployment patterns on AWS ECS, ensuring 99.9% pipeline availability.

projects.name: Intelligent Perception & Sensor Fusion Framework
bullets: Engineered deep learning perception networks tailored for processing multi-modal sensor data streams (Camera, LiDAR, and Radar) to elevate environment mapping fidelity.
Constructed specialized synthetic data generation pipelines to dynamically generate rare target profiles and edge-case hazards, boosting model accuracy on unseen data by 25%.
Integrated a highly responsive RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) infrastructure over enterprise vector databases, allowing internal teams to query dense sensor logs using natural language.
Developed and exposed customized REST APIs to handle high-throughput telemetry streams, enabling smooth integration with backend validation systems.
Implemented robust continuous validation logic to track model performance drift across recurring regression cycles, achieving an aggregate 95% bug-resolution rate prior to staging.

projects.name: Technical Training & Mentorship
bullets: Designed and delivered comprehensive, hands-on technical training curriculum covering core AI and Machine Learning paradigms utilizing Python, TensorFlow, and Keras.
Led deep-dive instructional sessions on classical ML algorithms, deep neural network architectures, computer vision basics, and NLP techniques.
Guided over 10+ end-to-end, real-world development projects, navigating teams through the entire engineering pipeline from EDA to production-grade model deployment.
Mentored software developers and engineering students on scalable AI architecture choices, data preprocessing strategies, hyperparameter tuning, and model evaluation metrics.
Evaluated student code and architectural designs, delivering constructive technical feedback to align academic projects with enterprise-level code quality standards.

projects.name: Client Projects
bullets: Delivered 15+ full stack and backend-driven projects for clients across various industries.
Built scalable backend services, data pipelines, and API integrations.
Worked with technologies including Python, Java, PHP, MySQL, and various frontend frameworks.

projects.title: Emotion-Based Book Recommendation System
projects.description: Developed a full-stack system using AI and machine learning to detect user emotions and personalize book recommendations in real-time.

projects.title: MCE Staff Loan Management System
projects.description: Created a web application with AI-ML techniques in Java, PHP, and SQL to automate and streamline loan processing workflows for institutional staff.

projects.title: Virtual Health Assistant
projects.description: Collaborated on an application that offers personalized health insights using natural language processing and machine learning for real-time health advice and preventive care recommendations.

education.degree: MTech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
Bachelor of Engineering in Information Science and Engineering

achievements.title: Extra Mile Award
achievements.description: Honored for relentless commitment, driving exceptional project delivery, and optimizing AI validation workflows within the Transportation Business Unit.

achievements.title: Best Team of the Quarter
achievements.description: Recognized alongside the ADAS Core Engineering group for successfully delivering the GenAI-driven scenario intelligence platform ahead of key client timelines.

achievements.title: Technical Mentor Distinction – Best Instructor
achievements.description: Awarded the 'Best Instructor' title for achieving a 95% milestone success rate across 10+ student-led machine learning deployment projects.
